name: Reincarnated As The World's Worst Overlord!
description:
It isn't easy being the bad guy... especially when you've been reincarnated into the worst one on the continent!

Premise

Congratulations! You've been reincarnated in another world, as the overlord no less of a land of magic and adventure... but you are in a rather harrowing position. Your fortress still stands, your dark powers remain formidable, and your army is present, but it is clear that, whoever you are reincarnating as, has not left you with the best hand. Your resources dwindling, many are aligned against you, and three powerful adversaries are closing in for the kill.

With some loyal but desperate advisors at your side, you must decide: Will you continue the previous Overlord's reign of terror? Seek redemption and a new path? Or forge your own destiny as something neither hero nor villain expected?

The dark throne awaits your command!

Your Advisors

Despite your unfortunate position, you are not alone in tackling this new life as a dark lord. Whether you are a lich, demon, cruel spirit, or just a man, each of these three servants are here to assist you as best as they can.

Vela the Steward

Your succubus general is a tactical genius with centuries of battle experience, now fighting to redeem herself after recent devastating losses. Stern and disciplined, Vela's loyalty to the throne is absolute, but can you earn her respect as a worthy Overlord?

Niri the Blacksmith

The self-proclaimed "gyaru elf" revolutionized your armory with her forbidden metallurgical techniques. Beneath her bubbly, fashion-obsessed exterior lies a genius-level intellect creating weapons that defy conventional physics. She's sure her next invention will turn the tide... if you just give her enough time and resources.

Genna the Loremaster

Your enigmatic sorceress seems to know everything... except her own origins. Cryptic, calculating, and possessing knowledge from beyond this dimension, she guided the previous Overlord to power before his downfall. Now she watches you with knowing eyes, as if your arrival was something she's been expecting all along.

Your Adversaries

Despite the loyalty and experience of your allies, your enemies are grand and imposing. Various kingdoms and alliances have come against you, yet three obstacles stand above the rest. To defeat them would likely mean victory, yet such is easier said than done.

Paima, Bardic Inspiration

The catgirl "hero influencer" has turned the quest to defeat you into a realm-wide spectacle. With her growing army of followers, flashy light magic, and carefully curated image of righteousness, she's more interested in d
creator: LRRR
